---
applyTo: "public/**/*.html,public/**/*.js,server/app.js"
description: "Use when editing site UI pages, dashboard pages, config pages, reservation pages, guest flows, payment flows, or related server handlers that drive those pages."
---

Before editing these files, read `.github/site-design-rules.md`.

Preserve:
- existing navigation labels
- page retrieval, save, and return-to-list patterns
- established dashboard and config structures
- page-specific flow assumptions
- sensitive reservation, payment, and guest-account journeys

Do not make broad structural changes unless explicitly requested.
